trans-unit.source: %1 reconciliation lines out of %2 are matched.\\
trans-unit.note: Codeunit Match Bank Rec. Lines MyTaxi - NamedType MatchSummaryMsg

trans-unit.source: Text shorter than %1 characters cannot be matched.
trans-unit.target: Impossibile individuare la corrispondenza di testo inferiore a %1 caratteri.
trans-unit.note: Codeunit Match Bank Rec. Lines MyTaxi - NamedType MissingMatchMsg

trans-unit.source: Please wait while the operation is being completed.
trans-unit.note: Codeunit Match Bank Rec. Lines MyTaxi - NamedType ProgressBarMsg
